Unexpected nullable string value in conditional. Please handle the nullish/empty cases explicitly.

suggestions.desc: Change condition to check for null/undefined (`value != null`)
Explicitly treat nullish value the same as an empty string (`value ?? ""`)
Explicitly convert value to a boolean (`Boolean(value)`)

messages.message: Arrow function has a complexity of 10. Maximum allowed is 8.
Unexpected any value in conditional. An explicit comparison or type conversion is required.

suggestions.desc: Explicitly convert value to a boolean (`Boolean(value)`)

messages.message: Unexpected object value in conditional. The condition is always true.
Unnecessary conditional, value is always truthy.
Unexpected string value in conditional. An explicit empty string check is required.

suggestions.desc: Change condition to check string's length (`value.length !== 0`)
Change condition to check for empty string (`value !== ""`)
Explicitly convert value to a boolean (`Boolean(value)`)

messages.message: Arrow function has a complexity of 9. Maximum allowed is 8.
Unexpected string value in conditional. An explicit empty string check is required.

suggestions.desc: Change condition to check string's length (`value.length !== 0`)
Change condition to check for empty string (`value !== ""`)
Explicitly convert value to a boolean (`Boolean(value)`)

messages.message: Arrow function has too many lines (122). Maximum allowed is 60.
Arrow function has a complexity of 17. Maximum allowed is 8.
Unexpected nullable string value in conditional. Please handle the nullish/empty cases explicitly.

suggestions.desc: Change condition to check for null/undefined (`value != null`)
Explicitly treat nullish value the same as an empty string (`value ?? ""`)
Explicitly convert value to a boolean (`Boolean(value)`)

messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: 'session' is already declared in the upper scope on line 46 column 26.
Unsafe member access .session on an `any` value.
Unnecessary conditional, expected left-hand side of `??` operator to be possibly null or undefined.
Unnecessary optional chain on a non-nullish value.

suggestions.desc: Remove unnecessary optional chain
